title: Fix a bug where results come back out of order
prompt: The file `fetchAll.mjs` exports `fetchAll(ids, fetchOne)` which should resolve to an array of results in the SAME order as `ids`. It currently uses a push-as-they-resolve pattern, so results arrive out of order. Fix it so the output order matches the input order. `fetchOne(id)` returns a Promise.

grade.command: node -e "import('./fetchAll.mjs').then(async m=>{const delay=(id)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(()=>r(id*10),(5-id)*10));const out=await m.fetchAll([1,2,3,4],delay);if(JSON.stringify(out)!=='[10,20,30,40]')throw new Error('got '+JSON.stringify(out));console.log('ok')})"
